lyrics_lrc:
[00:00.10]W is for Welcome — say hi, say hi!
[00:03.82]A is for Acting kind — try, try, try!
[00:07.56]V is for Value the friends by your side!
[00:11.38]E is Encourage with a smile so wide!
[00:15.10]Catch the wave, catch the wave!
[00:16.92]C-A-T-C-H the wave!
[00:18.92]Catch the wave, catch the wave!
[00:26.32]That's how a Sea Star be!
[00:30.08]Catch the wave, catch the wave!
[00:31.92]C-A-T-C-H the wave!
[00:34.00]Catch the wave, catch the wave!
[00:41.32]That's how a Sea Star be!
